supply_signal.label: Moderate Tightness
supply_signal.summary: H100/A100 broadly available at specialist clouds. H200 spot-available. B200/GB200 remain backordered 6-24 months at hyperscalers. Vast.ai marketplace H100 supply healthy.
supply_signal.key_driver: Blackwell (B200/GB200) demand is absorbing all new TSMC CoWoS capacity; Hopper (H100/H200) supply is normalizing.

gpu_availability.notes: Broadly available. Lambda, CoreWeave, RunPod all have stock.
Lambda + CoreWeave have limited H200 stock. AWS/GCP waitlist 4-8 weeks.
CoreWeave has enterprise contracts. No consumer/spot availability.
Enterprise-only. CoWoS-L packaging bottleneck limits ramp.
Fully commoditized. Best $/TFLOP for mid-size training runs.
Good inference GPU. Popular for latency-sensitive API serving.
Cheapest per TFLOP for FP16/BF16 inference. 24GB VRAM limits large models.
